applicability_notes: Binary elementwise op; fuses the log-sum-exp-of-two-tensors pattern log(exp(a)+exp(b)) into a single numerically-stable kernel. Golden function maps directly to torch.logaddexp.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.logaddexp(input_tensor_a, input_tensor_b); constraints: {'inputs': 2, 'broadcast': 'elementwise, shapes must be broadcast-compatible', 'layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT required', 'dtypes_validated': ['float32'], 'accuracy': 'pcc >= 0.999 vs torch.logaddexp'}
